metadata.name: playwright-go
metadata.description: Go driver and browser binaries for Playwright browser automation (playwright-go)

default.description: Go driver + Chromium browser binary (~200 MB)

all.description: Go driver + all browser binaries: Chromium + Firefox + WebKit (~600 MB)

default.description: Go driver + Chromium browser binary (~200 MB)

all.description: Go driver + all browser binaries: Chromium + Firefox + WebKit (~600 MB)

aiPrompts.versionDiscovery: Check GitHub releases for playwright-community/playwright-go. The Go module version tracks upstream Playwright versions.
aiPrompts.urlResolution: Driver and browser binaries are downloaded automatically by the playwright CLI tool via 'go run github.com/playwright-community/playwright-go/cmd/playwright@latest install'.
aiPrompts.updateGuidance: The @latest tag always fetches the newest version. For pinned versions use @v{version} suffix. The Go driver and browser binaries are always installed in compatible versions.
